summary: Documented reconciliation consumption semantics for feedback, documentation, and implementation builds so graph routing tracks unconsumed handoffs instead of stale accepted lifecycle metadata.
knowledge_changes: .codewiki/kb/system/builds.md: added consumption signals for feedback/documentation/implementation builds.
.codewiki/kb/system/graph.md: clarified reconciliation items represent actionable unconsumed handoffs.
roadmap_changes: TASK-054 created for implementation of reconciliation lifecycle consumption.
assumptions: Build consumption can be derived from downstream build links, roadmap changes, implementation evidence, and validation reports without hand-editing the generated graph.
